items.title: Fun Game! Although….
items.summary: 4.5 hours in, pretty fun game! Although coming from Limbus and Reverse1999 as well as path to nowhere, the gacha system threw me off. They do give you a lot of standard pulls, though most of the cooler characters at least in my opinion are in the other banners. I haven’t been able to pull any of the characters I want from the other banners and have already spent 20 bucks on the game. Removing two stars because of this. Thinking of deleting my account and starting over because of this. I wanted to be fair and not buy an account in this game, but honestly? If I can’t get ONE character I want I’d rather take the risk ban. Or just drop the game altogether. :/
items.author: BugLord333
